---
title: "Projects"
---

<style>

.project-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 25px;
  margin-top: 40px;
}

.project-card {
  padding: 60px 40px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background-color: #f5f7fa;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 600;
  transition: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;
}

.project-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0px 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
  background-color: #e9f2ff;
}

.project-card a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: black;
  display: block;
}

</style>


<div class="project-grid">

<div class="project-card">
<a href="project_skills.qmd">
Internship Skill Analysis
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<a href="missouri.qmd">
Missouri Budget Graph Maker
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<a href="ffdc.qmd">
Fast Food Data Comparison
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<a href="soundtrack_safeguard.qmd">
Soundtrack Safeguard
</a>
</div>

</div>
